_comment: Template for a captured real RariMe Query proof. Copy to rarimo_proof.json and fill with REAL values, then run: PROOF_FIXTURE=test/fixtures/rarimo_proof.json FORK=true forge test --match-test test_RealProof_Replay -vvv. The policy fields MUST match what the proof was generated with (see docs/RARIMO_PATH.md).
_timestampUpperbound_note: MUST be the exact timestamp_upperbound the proof was generated with (public signal 15). Do NOT leave 0 — 0 means 'now' and will not match the proof.
